summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Admin & Agent Management Portal. Tested authentication flows, session management, theme toggle, user interface, and role-based access control. Found session persistence issues during navigation but core functionality works well.

integration_issues.issue: User gets logged out when navigating between pages using sidebar links
integration_issues.details: Session persists when using direct URL navigation but fails when clicking sidebar navigation links. This affects user experience as users need to re-login frequently.

passed_tests: Admin login with credentials admin/admin123 - successful authentication and dashboard access
Agent login with credentials john.smith/agent123 - successful authentication and agent dashboard access
Theme toggle functionality - switches between light and dark mode correctly
User dropdown menu - shows user info and logout option
Logout functionality - successfully logs out and redirects to login page
Agents page loads with existing agent data (3 agents: John Smith, Sarah Johnson, Mike Davis)
Create Agent modal opens and displays all form fields correctly
Agent form validation and field types work properly
Events page accessible and displays existing events
Role-based access control - admin sees admin dashboard, agent sees agent dashboard
Agent dashboard shows personalized content and assigned events only
Session persistence works with direct URL navigation
Login page displays demo credentials for both admin and agent
Responsive design and proper styling with Tailwind CSS
Toast notifications work for login success and other actions
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix session persistence issue during sidebar navigation. The authentication context appears to lose state when navigating between pages using React Router links in the sidebar. This is likely related to how the AuthContext or localStorage is being managed during route transitions. Users should be able to navigate between pages without being logged out.
